name: aws-skills
description: AWS development with infrastructure automation and cloud architecture patterns
capabilities: Provides AWS infrastructure automation patterns and templates
Offers cloud architecture best practices and design guidance
Helps implement AWS services integration (EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS)
Generates infrastructure as code snippets for common scenarios
Explains AWS security best practices and compliance patterns
Assists with cost optimization strategies for AWS resources
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analyzer flagged 4 patterns that are all false positives. The network findings (lines 4, 22) are documentation URLs in markdown format, not executable network calls. The weak cryptographic algorithm findings (lines 3, 20) do not correspond to actual crypto code - the file contains only descriptive text. This skill is purely informational documentation with no executable code or security risks.
valueStatement: Streamline AWS development with proven infrastructure patterns and cloud architecture guidance. Automate repetitive cloud tasks and implement AWS best practices efficiently using Claude, Codex, or Claude Code.
userTitle: Build AWS Cloud Solutions with AI Assistance
limitations: Does not execute AWS commands or interact with your AWS account directly
Requires manual review and testing of generated infrastructure code
AWS service offerings change frequently - verify patterns against current documentation
Does not replace the need for AWS certifications or professional expertise

useCases.title: Cloud Infrastructure Setup
useCases.description: Quickly scaffold AWS infrastructure patterns including VPCs, subnets, security groups, and compute resources with best practice configurations.

useCases.title: Serverless Application Development
useCases.description: Design and implement serverless architectures using Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, and event-driven patterns for scalable applications.

useCases.title: Cost Optimization Review
useCases.description: Analyze existing AWS architectures and identify opportunities for cost reduction through right-sizing, reserved instances, and architecture improvements.

promptTemplates.title: Basic AWS Resource Query
promptTemplates.prompt: Explain how to set up an EC2 instance with a security group that allows HTTP and SSH access. Include the AWS CLI commands and explain each parameter.

promptTemplates.title: Infrastructure Pattern Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a CloudFormation template for a three-tier web application with public subnets for load balancers, private subnets for application servers, and isolated subnets for databases.
promptTemplates.scenario: Intermediate architect designing secure network topology

promptTemplates.title: Serverless Architecture Design
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a serverless image processing pipeline using S3, Lambda, and DynamoDB. Include event triggers, error handling, and scaling considerations.

promptTemplates.title: Security Audit and Recommendations
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this AWS IAM policy and identify security risks. Suggest improvements following the principle of least privilege and AWS security best practices.

bestPractices: Always enable encryption at rest and in transit for AWS resources
Use IAM roles and instance profiles instead of hardcoded credentials
Implement tagging strategies for cost allocation and resource organization
antiPatterns: Using root account credentials for daily operations or automation
Creating overly permissive security groups with open inbound rules
Hardcoding secrets in infrastructure as code templates

faq.question: Does this skill execute AWS commands on my behalf?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides guidance, patterns, and code snippets. You must manually review and execute any AWS commands or deploy any infrastructure code it generates.

faq.question: Is the AWS information up to date?
faq.answer: AWS services evolve rapidly. Always verify generated patterns against the official AWS documentation and consider service region availability.

faq.question: Can this skill help with AWS cost optimization?
faq.answer: Yes. It can suggest cost optimization strategies like rightsizing, reserved instances, spot instances, and architecture improvements. However, actual cost analysis requires AWS Cost Explorer or third-party tools.

faq.question: Does this skill support all AWS services?
faq.answer: It covers major AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, DynamoDB, VPC, IAM, and CloudFormation. Less common or newer services may have limited coverage.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for multi-cloud architectures?
faq.answer: This skill focuses specifically on AWS. For multi-cloud scenarios, you would need additional skills for other cloud providers like Azure or GCP.

faq.question: Is infrastructure as code generated production-ready?
faq.answer: Generated code provides a starting point but requires review, testing, and customization for your specific requirements before production deployment.
